steps.title: Identify the question type
steps.content: This is a word-in-context question. The blank describes the kind of environment created when kelp forests slow down rough ocean currents.

steps.title: Use the surrounding context
steps.content: The sentence itself defines the answer: "a more ______ environment with calmer waters where animals can take shelter." The blank must be a synonym for calm/peaceful.

steps.title: Per-choice elimination
steps.content:
• Choice B — dangerous: contradicts the passage, which says the slowed currents create a safer environment for shelter. ✗
  • Choice C — imaginative: nonsensical — environments are not literally imaginative, and the word has no relation to current speed or safety. ✗
  • Choice D — surprising: the passage describes a predictable physical effect of slowed currents, not anything unexpected. ✗
That matches Choice A — tranquil.
